RURIMEGU-ENTRANCE_EXAM.title: Entrance Exam
RURIMEGU-ENTRANCE_EXAM.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Burst[/gold] [blue]9[/blue].
RURIMEGU-LIVE_SYNC_CHRONOMETER.title: Live-Sync Chronometer
RURIMEGU-LIVE_SYNC_CHRONOMETER.descripti: During your turn, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] once per real-time minute.
RURIMEGU-TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.title: The Tale of Peter Rabbit
RURIMEGU-TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.descriptio: If your [gold]❤️[/gold] have not reached the cap at the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_EARS.title: Bunny Ears
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_EARS.description: For every [blue]10[/blue] [gold]❤️[/gold] overflowed, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-SHOPPING_MALL.title: Shopping Mall
RURIMEGU-SHOPPING_MALL.description: All enemies drop an extra card reward. At the end of each combat, lose {Gold:diff()} Gold.
RURIMEGU-CAP_LIBERATOR.title: Cap Liberator
RURIMEGU-CAP_LIBERATOR.description: Upon pickup, remove every pair of identical unupgraded cards from your deck. For each removed pair, add one upgraded copy.
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.title: Linkura System
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.flavor: A system that allows all school idols to bloom!
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.title: DREAM_Define
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.flavor:
Welcome, visitor.
Have a pleasant journey to Elysion.
